articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: Samsung’s Desperation To Keep Galaxy S27 Component Costs Down Has Forced It To Seek A Supplier Of Inferior Quality Displays - Wccftech
articles.description: Rising DRAM costs has forced Samsung to look for an OLED supplier for the base Galaxy S27 that won’t provide it with the same high-quality panels
articles.content: Smartphone titans like Samsung have made efforts to ensure that the DRAM crisis doesnt adversely affect their day to day operations, but these attempts were futile as the Korean giant has been forced… [+2229 chars]
